tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (test_value_guard_rejects_non_objects, test_error_path_cleanup, test_cleanup_count) are purely source text analysis — they read ffi.zig and search for string patterns like 'isObject', 'arg_types.deinit' without executing any code or testing runtime behavior. The note in the test file acknowledges 'Zig requires the full Bun build toolchain... All checks therefore operate on source analysis.' This means every f2p test is effectively `assert 'foo' in open(path).read()`.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests check for specific code patterns (isObject guard, arg_types.deinit cleanup) that don't exist in the base commit. A stub or no-op change would not introduce these patterns, so the tests would fail without an actual implementation.
